tender.description: Improvement of sewerage system of Kabool Nagar, East Rohtash Nagar and adjoining area by making proper and nearest outfall arrangement and replacement of old damaged 250 mm sewer line into 400 mm dia DWC pipe sewer line from H.No- 657 Kabool Nagar
